name: listicle
description: "3 reasons" retention-contract ad: the numbered open commits the viewer to the payoff. Proven top-performer format for all funnel stages. ~30s.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Numbered promise that sets a retention contract — e.g. '3 reasons this beats everything else I tried' (visual pattern-interrupt on frame one)

beats.title: Reason 1
beats.goal: Strongest differentiator first, shown not told — product visibly demonstrating the point

beats.title: Reason 2
beats.goal: Second differentiator, ideally answering the category's biggest objection

beats.title: Reason 3
beats.goal: Most surprising/specific reason — the one people comment about; label hero moment

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: Recap in five words, then one clear action with light urgency
